content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach repeatedly names what the client is showing — not just what she's saying. Turn 4 reads the comparison-to-brother as a measuring stick rather than just engaging the content. Turn 8 names the somatic/behavioral picture ('sat on the edge of your bed at 5am, alone, and didn't cry') and ties it to the nightly drinking pattern. Turn 10 catches the linguistic tell ('not clean') and names the deflection into logistics as the same defensive function as the drinking ('doing the same job. Keeping that from opening'). Turn 14 explicitly uses observation language ('What I notice is that you just said something true... and then immediately called yourself a bad daughter for it') — naming the self-verdict reflex in the moment it happens. Reads consistently precede the questions rather than being blind inquiries. The coach also tracks the bait in turn 9/11 ('isn't this what the body is asking for?') and meets it directly in turn 12 without getting hooked. Reads are specific (the verdict-after-truth pattern, the deflection-to-logistics, the not-crying signature) rather than generic mood-naming.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reflects content ('should be over it') but doesn't yet name a stance read."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the comparison-as-measure pattern ('Your brother's timeline became the measure you're holding yourself to') — a stance read, not just content."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Slows and stays on the charged moment — implicit read that this is the live wire, though no explicit somatic naming."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the behavioral signature (didn't cry, still hasn't, makes sure every night not to feel) — connecting drinking pattern to unfelt grief without saying it generically."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic tell 'not clean,' names the logistics deflection and the drinking as serving the same defensive function. Specific, timely read."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Doesn't get baited by the 'body asking for what it needs' frame; distinguishes the body asking vs. the body asking it to stop. Reads the bait accurately."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit observation language: 'What I notice is that you just said something true... and then immediately called yourself a bad daughter.' Names the verdict reflex in real time."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "kinked-emotions"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-rush-signature", "calibrate-the-threshold"],
  "notes": "Strong on reads of defensive structure, linguistic caveats, and the said-vs-shown distinction. Less explicit somatic naming (breath, voice, pace) than a Joe exemplar, but the pattern-level and linguistic reads are specific, timely, and grounded the questions. Clearly a 3."
}
